journey.name: Draw and Sync Stroke
journey.description: Verifies that selecting a brush, drawing a stylus stroke on the canvas, and triggering sync uploads data to the backend.

actions.action: Verify that the canvas is visible and active page is "Page 1"
Tap the "Brush Selector" button in the toolbar
Inject stylus stroke from (100, 200) to (300, 400) with pressure 0.6, tilt 0.3
Verify that canvas stroke count is 1
Verify that sync state changes to "Syncing..." then "Sync Successful"
